_notes: Each topic maps to a set of tag patterns used to match entries across all content JSON files
match_tags: entries with ANY of these tags (case-insensitive partial match) are pulled into the topic
match_fields: entries with ANY of these fields are also considered relevant
reading_paths: curated sequences per audience — each entry references an id from any content JSON
audience keys: student | general | policy | legal | economist | technologist

topics.name: AI Governance
topics.description: How should societies govern artificial intelligence? This topic covers regulatory frameworks, institutional design, safety standards, and the political philosophy underlying AI policy — from federal legislation to international coordination.

student.description: Start with the foundational question, then see how governance works in practice.
